subcodes.first_line: O friends of the Most Merciful! God designated that city by the name of Faran, so that it might surge with the fire of the love of God and blaze forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران رحمان یزدان نام آن مدینه را فاران نهاد تا به نار محبت الله فوران نماید و شعله
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @bringing forth results; fruit
